column1: # order. mcfs-first is what keeps MeshCore out of Meshtastic's filesystem.
# Meshtastic's LittleFS finds the `spiffs` row by NAME
# Reordering these rows reintroduces cross-app settings wipe.
# `nesrom` is found BY NAME by Anemoia (flash_mmap.cpp); the guest erases/writes
# it itself from SD (CRC-skipped). Max ROM = 786
